changes.description: Removed verbose JSON examples, Python snippets, and redundant explanatory text. Total command words: 7573 → ~6986 (under 7000 budget). Biggest savings: implement.md (-177), plan.md (-150), team.md (-162).

changes.task: Fix skill and agent documentation accuracy
changes.description: Reviewed 3 skills for stale references (none found). Updated implementer.md Cycle step 3 with TaskDescV2 micro_steps/tdd protocol reference.

changes.task: Clean up context, team, and spawn command formatting
changes.description: Trimmed team.md implement action from 512 to under 400 words by replacing inline Python with bridge function references. context.md and spawn.md reviewed — no changes needed.
